objective: Plan owner-bound route binding, manifest-complete backup and staged restore, forward-only activation, and durable cleanup obligations.
falsifiable_claim: Route or owner drift, incomplete restoration, stale activation, and parent or provider loss cannot silently advance state or erase required cleanup.
dependencies: Artifact, secret, and provider owner contracts
exit_criteria: Route, TLS, and owner drift fail closed; every restored byte and secret disposition verifies before apply.
Stale or superseded activation cannot advance and parent deletion or provider loss cannot erase cleanup duty.
Retained evidence log contains exactly one literal M2_ROUTE_RESTORE_ACTIVATION_CLEANUP_EXIT=0; process exit status alone is insufficient.
adversarial_or_fault_proof: Mutate route owner, TLS identity, manifest bytes, secret disposition, activation predecessor, provider presence, parent existence, and cleanup acknowledgements.
remaining_nonclaims: Environment recovery does not imply outcome recovery.
No M10 continuity, provider reliability, or stage closure claim.
source_provenance: Plan-level proposal derived from docs/architecture/_meta/work-items/m0-m14-plan-gap-audit.md at origin/master 61eba1802992c01efa7d3188184ff315ad9d2ba0; status transaction 2026-07-22.
